, AML Compliance, and AI-driven analytics. Hands-on technical leader who architects scalable multi-tenant platforms, drives cross-team engineering decisions, and delivers complex freelance and enterprise projects end-to-end.

) and AML Compliance systems for banking clients.

: AI-driven platform using OCR, face matching, and fingerprint biometrics â€” reduced customer onboarding from days to minutes. Stack: Python, ASP.NET Core.
